text:
Plan Option Indicator ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary received coverage through the 1915(i) state plan 
option (SPO). There are separate variables for each of 12 the months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: 
SPO_1915I_IND_01 
SPO_1915I_IND_02 
SPO_1915I_IND_03 
SPO_1915I_IND_04 
SPO_1915I_IND_05 
SPO_1915I_IND_06 
 SPO_1915I_IND_07 
SPO_1915I_IND_08 
SPO_1915I_IND_09 
SPO_1915I_IND_10 
SPO_1915I_IND_11 
SPO_1915I_IND_12 

LONG NAME:
